name: A Natsuki Valentine's Day Special! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club
description:
Natsuki decided to get you chocolate for Valentine's Day! Is this some sort of sign? Or is it just... Being friendly?

"Welcome to where time stands still. No one leaves, and no one will."

"ItS noT VaLenTinEs dAY! WhY mAke ThIs NoW!?!" - You, probably. — Because I can! That's why! Besides, it's cute... And wholesome... Why are we arguing?! Kiss me! Or something. Damn. So— Here's what to expect!

  • Fluff Prioritized! - No horror, no depression! Just wholesome Tsundere Natsuki fluff! (She likes you fr.)

  • Extra: Natsuki's Father is not going to be home if you head over to her home. (At least, I have it written that way! Who knows if JLLM will listen.)

  • A Confession! - Expect a confession at some point, as it is Valentine's Day in this scenario! And she likes you! I mean, like— she got you chocolate bro. 🤞🏻

THAT'S IT!

Let me know if you enjoyed! All my Natsuki fanboys gonna love this one. They been waiting for me to show some love to Natsuki! And I do have a Discord! Feel free to join! Join: HERE!

I love you... 💙

Update! As of January 11th, this has been changed from MalePOV to ANYPOV! Enjoy! 🙏🏻💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
